Summary: Symbolic Interpreter AI: backend endpoints missing
Description:
Docs claim backend AI service and endpoints implemented, but no server-side implementation found. Frontend calls `/symbolic-interpreter/*` and uses aiCallback; no backend module located.
Evidence: docs/backLegacy/obsolete_architecture/SYMBOLIC_INTERPRETER_AI_IMPLEMENTATION.md; tonyblanco-app/lib/api/symbolic-interpreter-api.ts; repo search (no backend files)
column15: Decide: Implement server endpoints & safety contract OR Deprecate/disable frontend feature

Description:
Docs state canonical tests are non-clinical in TESTS_HOLISTIC_CATALOG.md but legacy clinical tests remain active (example: phq-9). Decision required on whether to enforce the canonical catalog or maintain a hybrid.
Evidence: docs/00_SOURCE_OF_TRUTH/TESTS_HOLISTIC_CATALOG.md; tests_catalog_status.json; backend/api/test_models.py
column15: Decide governance: Enforce catalog (archive clinical) OR maintain hybrid

Description:
Package should expose subpaths used by frontend, but Turbopack did not respect deep exports and tsconfig path mappings caused build failures; build was stable after switching to webpack.
Evidence: packages/symbolic/package.json; docs/11_DIAGNOSTICS/NEXT_TURBOPACK_FAILED_TO_LOAD_CHUNK.md; tonyblanco-app/tsconfig.json
column15: Decide packaging policy: maintain deep exports and support bundler OR restructure package to single-entry

Description:
tsconfig paths point to ../packages/symbolic/dist/* and override node_modules resolution, causing aliasing to workspace and breaking builds. Decide a mapping policy for production vs local dev.
Evidence: tonyblanco-app/tsconfig.json; build logs
column15: Decide: remove mappings in production builds and document local dev steps

Description:
Docs declare Symbolic Interpreter AI implementation COMPLETE but backend endpoints are missing; doc is misleading. Update doc status to 'Draft/In progress' OR implement backend.
Evidence: docs/backLegacy/obsolete_architecture/SYMBOLIC_INTERPRETER_AI_IMPLEMENTATION.md; repo search
column15: Decide: Update doc status to 'Draft/In progress' OR implement backend; urgent

Description:
Docs list Tarot/Astrology workspaces as 'NO TOCAR' (isolation policy), yet workspaces are present and actively used; operational risk exists if modified without governance.
Evidence: docs/WORKSPACE_MATRIX.md; tonyblanco-app/components/*
column15: Confirm & formalize isolation procedures and ownership

Description:

Description:
